title: 日落帝國奶共好好揾，我就是例子

replies.msg:
睇英國黃藍地圖就知邊間奶邊間唔奶：
https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/1/viewer?mid=1YZvR1qjiUbFYyecnHeKj1Js1ZxO2FVRf&ll=53.479105399999995%2C-2.240364999999991&z=9

用法：copy條link ，貼係你手機嘅瀏覽器到
可以選擇顯示咩店鋪 eg只顯示黃食店

更多黃藍報料：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdihaSUVmCQF8vYpFcC7IfJ2q2uUF6Wlgdok3zAQCY5-rSb4A/viewform

經過一個多月的準備，我們終於推出了英國版黃藍地圖。除了食肆之外，我們還包括了其他商戶，當中包括地產，零售及保健等等，使香港人，以及所有反共的人，可以在各方面的消費上有了選擇。我們希望這個計劃可以慢慢擴張，終有一日希望可以吸納更多本地英國人的商戶參加我們的計劃。我們感謝所有提供資料給我們的人，沒有你們，這個計劃就沒有可能成功。如果有更多關於黃藍地圖的疑問，或者有更多關於黃藍商戶的資訊，歡迎DM我們。

_

We have finally launched the ”Solidarity of HK map” (Yellow-Blue map). Just in case if you are new here, the map is essentially a map that differentiates between Pro-Chinese Communist Party businesses (we label them as blue businesses) and Pro-Hong Kong democracy or Anti-Chinese Communist Party businesses.(we label them as yellow businesses) Within the map, we have included a variety of businesses ranging from restaurants to retail. Our hope is to eventually promote this scheme to local businesses which have no pre-established ties or connections to the Hong Kong democracy movement or anti-CCP movements. We would like to take this opportunity to thank everyone who provided us with the necessary information to start up this map. If you have any queries about the "Solidarity of HK map" (Yellow-Blue map), or have more information regarding potential businesses which could be included in this scheme, do not hesitate to DM us.

———————————————

Letter to MP template:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1GS_koT_s-7pbU8GaseqR_qXvem3atFZKco1ERkusrj4/edit?usp=sharing

We have finally launched the ”Solidarity of HK map” (Yellow-Blue map). Just in case if you are new here, the map is essentially a map that differentiates between Pro-Chinese Communist Party businesses (we label them as blue businesses) and Pro-Hong Kong democracy or Anti-Chinese Communist Party businesses.(we label them as yellow businesses) Within the map, we have included a variety of businesses ranging from restaurants to retail. Our hope is to eventually promote this scheme to local businesses which have no pre-established ties or connections to the Hong Kong democracy movement or anti-CCP movements. If you have any queries about the "Solidarity of HK map" (Yellow-Blue map), or have more information regarding potential businesses which could be included in this scheme, do not hesitate to DM us.

睇英國黃藍地圖就知邊間奶邊間唔奶：
https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/1/viewer?mid=1YZvR1qjiUbFYyecnHeKj1Js1ZxO2FVRf&ll=53.479105399999995%2C-2.240364999999991&z=9

用法：copy條link ，貼係你手機嘅瀏覽器到
可以選擇顯示咩店鋪 eg只顯示黃食店

更多黃藍報料：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdihaSUVmCQF8vYpFcC7IfJ2q2uUF6Wlgdok3zAQCY5-rSb4A/viewform

經過一個多月的準備，我們終於推出了英國版黃藍地圖。除了食肆之外，我們還包括了其他商戶，當中包括地產，零售及保健等等，使香港人，以及所有反共的人，可以在各方面的消費上有了選擇。我們希望這個計劃可以慢慢擴張，終有一日希望可以吸納更多本地英國人的商戶參加我們的計劃。我們感謝所有提供資料給我們的人，沒有你們，這個計劃就沒有可能成功。如果有更多關於黃藍地圖的疑問，或者有更多關於黃藍商戶的資訊，歡迎DM我們。

_

We have finally launched the ”Solidarity of HK map” (Yellow-Blue map). Just in case if you are new here, the map is essentially a map that differentiates between Pro-Chinese Communist Party businesses (we label them as blue businesses) and Pro-Hong Kong democracy or Anti-Chinese Communist Party businesses.(we label them as yellow businesses) Within the map, we have included a variety of businesses ranging from restaurants to retail. Our hope is to eventually promote this scheme to local businesses which have no pre-established ties or connections to the Hong Kong democracy movement or anti-CCP movements. We would like to take this opportunity to thank everyone who provided us with the necessary information to start up this map. If you have any queries about the "Solidarity of HK map" (Yellow-Blue map), or have more information regarding potential businesses which could be included in this scheme, do not hesitate to DM us.

———————————————

Letter to MP template:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1GS_koT_s-7pbU8GaseqR_qXvem3atFZKco1ERkusrj4/edit?usp=sharing
